title: Easy Lover
why_this_song: Easy Lover by Phil Collins (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: She'll take your heart but you won't feel it
And I'm just trying to make you see
Get out quick 'cause seein' is believin'

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "she's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "she's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She'll get a hold on you, believe it

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Easy Lover" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Easy Lover", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Easy Lover" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Easy Lover" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Easy Lover", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Easy Lover", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Easy Lover" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Easy Lover" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
